//: FRAMEWORK-OWNED REFERENCE, adapted for catalyst (project ADR-0001/0002/0004; deviates from fw-ADR-0022/0025). The prescribed React + Vite + TS + Tailwind + shadcn/ui stack ships here so the foundation milestone ADOPTS and EXTENDS it instead of authoring the shell file-by-file. catalyst is a purely static, PUBLIC, auth-less SPA — there is NO Azure Entra / MSAL (removed per ADR-0002; the SPA mints and validates no tokens). `style-dictionary` (devDep, ADR-0029) GENERATES the CSS-variable token layer (src/styles/tokens.generated.css) from the DTCG tokens.json — `tokens:build` runs it, and `predev`/`prebuild` run it automatically so the theme can never drift from the tokens. Deps are EXACT-pinned (no ^ ranges) and acquired ONLY via the committed package-lock.json + `npm ci` inside the container build / dev service. The foundation adds feature-specific deps by pinning them here and re-running `npm install` to update the lockfile, then commits both. `dev` runs the Vite dev server (HMR); `build` emits dist/ for the nginx prod image; `typecheck` is the per-feature `tsc --noEmit` gate and `test` the per-feature `vitest` tier (project ADR-0004).
name: frontend
